caption:
This is what three sessions of RF Microneedling looks like.

The texture refinement you're seeing isn't a filter—it's the result of your body producing new collagen in response to controlled micro-injuries combined with radiofrequency heat.

Session 1: Initial collagen stimulation. Skin begins tightening within 2 weeks.
Session 2: Pore size visibly reduces. Fine lines start softening.
Session 3: Full collagen remodeling is underway. Skin tone evens. Texture transforms.

And the results continue improving for up to 6 months after your final session as new collagen matures.

This patient came to us wanting smoother, firmer skin without surgery or extensive downtime. Three treatments, spaced 4-6 weeks apart. This is her result.

Your transformation starts with a consultation. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Before and after split image showing visible skin texture improvement. Left: pre-treatment skin with visible pores and fine lines. Right: post 3-session skin with refined texture and even tone. Professional clinical photography with consistent lighting. Rani watermark.
